DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
